text:
The problem is clear. `createClient` is called once at module load with no `chains` — so the SDK has no chain definitions. The SDK needs chains passed in via `convertViemChainToRelayChain`. The fix: initialize the client with the chains from our wagmi config, and re-initialize it once `useRelayChains` returns the full chain list.

The cleanest approach: use `useRelayChains`'s `viemChains` to re-initialize the client inside the component after chains load.
